meta.name: Wandr Seed Dataset
meta.purpose: Static stand-in for all AI features. Every 'AI' action in the app (draft generation, recommendations, categorising inspiration, live alerts) is a lookup/derivation from this file. No network, no model calls.

shimla.name: Shimla
shimla.tagline: Colonial hill station - ridges, toy train, pine walks.
flexRules: Mall Road is pedestrian-only - plan on foot, not cab.
Most sights cluster around The Ridge; group by walking distance.
Afternoons can cloud over - do viewpoints in the morning.

places.name: The Ridge & Mall Road
places.why: The social heart - everything radiates from here on foot.
places.tip: Start early, fewer crowds + clear views of the snow line.

places.name: Jakhoo Temple
places.why: Highest point in Shimla, 360° valley views. Hanuman temple.
places.tip: Watch your snacks - monkeys. Walk up (30 min); ropeway is ₹500 return.
places.howToReach: Ropeway from The Ridge (10 min) or 30-min uphill walk

places.name: Christ Church
places.why: 2nd-oldest church in N. India, the postcard of Shimla.
places.tip: Best light for photos before 10am.

places.name: Kufri
places.why: Snow point + adventure park, 30-min drive out.
places.tip: Skip the overpriced horse rides; walk the nature park.
places.howToReach: Cab from Mall Road, ~45 min each way

places.name: Café Sol / Mall Road dining
places.why: Reliable group dinner, vegetarian-friendly, valley view.
places.tip: Book a window table for sunset.

places.name: Scandal Point sunset
places.why: Where the Ridge meets Mall Road - golden hour spot.
places.tip: Grab a chai from the kiosk and just sit.

places.name: Toy Train (Kalka–Shimla)
places.why: UNESCO heritage narrow-gauge ride through 100+ tunnels.
places.tip: Book the short Shimla–Summer Hill leg if short on time.

places.name: Annandale (Army Heritage)
places.why: Flat green meadow, quiet, good for a slow afternoon.
places.tip: Carry ID - it sits inside an army area.

alert.title: Rain expected 2–4pm near Kufri
alert.why: Afternoon showers forecast at higher altitude. Outdoor viewpoints will be socked in.
alert.swapIn: Indian Institute of Advanced Study (indoor heritage tour)

goa.name: Goa
goa.tagline: Beaches, cafés, Portuguese old town, sunset shacks.
flexRules: North (party/cafés) vs South (quiet/clean) - pick one base, don't bounce.
Rent a scooter; cabs are pricey and scarce.
Beaches are an evening thing in peak heat - mornings for old town.

places.name: Fort Aguada
places.why: 17th-c. Portuguese fort + lighthouse over the Arabian Sea.
places.tip: Go before 10am, no shade later.

places.name: Fontainhas (Latin Quarter)
places.why: Candy-coloured Portuguese lanes, art cafés.
places.tip: Best photo light early morning.

places.name: Baga / Calangute Beach
places.why: Classic north-Goa beach + water sports.
places.tip: Sunset + shack dinner combo.

places.name: Anjuna Flea Market
places.why: Wednesday market, boho stalls, live music.
places.tip: Wednesdays only - check your day.

places.name: Curlies / beach shack dinner
places.why: Feet-in-sand seafood, sunset.
places.tip: Order the prawn balchão.

places.name: Dudhsagar Falls
places.why: Tiered jungle waterfall, jeep safari.
places.tip: Full-day trip - book a jeep tour.

alert.title: Anjuna market is closed today
alert.why: The flea market only runs on Wednesdays - today is not Wednesday.

manali.name: Manali
manali.tagline: Snow passes, river cafés, adventure + old town charm.
flexRules: Atal Tunnel needs no permit (Rohtang Pass does) - either way start early, plan day 1.
Old Manali cafés are a 15-min uphill walk from Mall Road.
Weather flips fast at altitude - keep a buffer day.

places.name: Atal Tunnel / Sissu
places.why: Drive through the world's longest high-altitude tunnel to snow.
places.tip: Leave by 7am, roads close with snow.

places.name: Hadimba Temple
places.why: Cedar-forest wooden temple, 1553.
places.tip: Lovely in morning mist.

places.name: Old Manali cafés
places.why: Riverside cafés, slow vibe, live music.
places.tip: Café 1947 by the river.

places.name: Solang Valley
places.why: Paragliding, zorbing, ropeway, snow.
places.tip: Negotiate adventure-sport prices.

places.name: Mall Road & Manu Market
places.why: Shopping, woollens, street food.
places.tip: Bargain for shawls.

places.name: Jogini Falls trek
places.why: Short scenic waterfall trek from Vashisht.
places.tip: Carry water; ~1 hr each way.

alert.title: Atal Tunnel jam - 90-min delay
alert.why: Heavy tourist traffic + a snow-clearing convoy on the pass.
alert.impact: Your full-day Sissu trip will eat into the evening.

jaipur.name: Jaipur
jaipur.tagline: The Pink City - forts, palaces, bazaars, royal Rajputana.
jaipur.photo: jaipur pink city hawa mahal fort
flexRules: Summers are brutal (40°C+) - do forts before noon, bazaars after dark.
Amber Fort, Nahargarh & Jaigarh cluster north - do them as one day.
Old City (Pink City) sights are walkable - park once, explore on foot.

places.name: Amber Fort
places.why: Hilltop Rajput fort-palace with mirror halls and ramparts.
places.tip: Reach by 8am to beat heat and crowds at the Sheesh Mahal.

places.name: Hawa Mahal
places.why: The iconic 953-window honeycomb palace facade.
places.tip: Best light is early morning from the café across the road.

places.name: City Palace
places.why: Living royal palace with courtyards, textiles and armoury.
places.tip: The peacock gates in Pritam Niwas Chowk are the photo spot.
places.howToReach: Old City, next to Jantar Mantar

places.name: Jantar Mantar
places.why: UNESCO 18th-c. astronomical instruments, incl. world's largest sundial.
places.tip: Hire a guide - the instruments make no sense without one.

places.name: Nahargarh Fort sunset
places.photo: nahargarh fort jaipur sunset city view
places.why: Cliff-edge fort with the best sunset panorama over the Pink City.
places.tip: Padao café at the top for a drink at golden hour.
places.howToReach: Cab up the Aravalli road, ~30 min

places.name: Johari & Bapu Bazaar
places.why: Jewellery, block-print textiles and mojari shoes in the old bazaars.
places.tip: Bargain hard; most shops shut Sundays.

places.name: Rawat / LMB thali dinner
places.why: Classic Rajasthani thali - dal baati churma, ghewar sweets.
places.tip: Rawat's pyaaz kachori is the local legend.

places.name: Jal Mahal viewpoint
places.photo: jal mahal jaipur lake water palace
places.why: Sandstone palace sitting mid-lake - a quick scenic photo stop.
places.tip: You can't go inside; view it from the Amer road promenade.
places.howToReach: On the road to Amber, ~15 min

alert.title: Heatwave - 43°C by afternoon
alert.why: A dry Rajasthan heat spike; the exposed hilltop forts have almost no shade past noon.
alert.impact: An afternoon at Nahargarh Fort risks heat exhaustion.

rishikesh.name: Rishikesh
rishikesh.tagline: Ganges gorge - yoga capital, rafting, aarti and swaying bridges.
rishikesh.photo: rishikesh ganges lakshman jhula bridge himalayas
flexRules: Rishikesh is dry & vegetarian - no meat or alcohol anywhere in town.
Rafting runs only when the river level is safe - book a morning slot.
Tapovan/Laxman Jhula side is the café-and-yoga hub; cross on foot.

places.name: Lakshman Jhula & Ram Jhula
places.why: Iconic suspension bridges over the Ganga linking temples and cafés.
places.tip: Cross early - motorbikes and monkeys crowd it by midday.

places.name: Triveni Ghat Ganga Aarti
places.photo: triveni ghat rishikesh ganga aarti lamps
places.why: Nightly fire-lamp river ceremony - the spiritual heart of town.
places.tip: Arrive 45 min early for a spot on the steps.

places.name: Ganga White-Water Rafting
places.photo: rishikesh ganga white water rafting rapids
places.why: Grade II–IV rapids on the Ganga - the classic Rishikesh thrill.
places.tip: Do the 16km Shivpuri stretch; wear quick-dry clothes.

places.name: Beatles Ashram (Chaurasi Kutia)
places.why: Abandoned ashram where the Beatles stayed, now covered in murals.
places.tip: Carry water; it's a leafy 40-min wander through the domes.
places.howToReach: Inside Rajaji forest, cab + short walk

places.name: Parmarth Niketan Ashram
places.photo: parmarth niketan rishikesh ganga aarti ashram
places.why: Riverside ashram with a serene, well-known evening aarti.
places.tip: A quieter, more musical aarti than Triveni's crowds.

places.name: Neelkanth Mahadev Temple
places.why: Hilltop Shiva temple through forested Himalayan foothills.
places.tip: The 32km ghat road is winding - leave early, half a day gone.

places.name: The Sitting Elephant / riverside café
places.why: Ganga-view cafés for a slow, meat-free dinner and mint tea.
places.tip: Grab a river-facing cushion seat at dusk.

places.name: Kunjapuri Sunrise Point
places.why: Pre-dawn drive to a temple hilltop for Himalayan sunrise views.
places.tip: Leave stay by 4:30am to catch the peaks glowing.

alert.title: Rafting suspended - high water level
alert.why: Upstream rain has pushed the Ganga above the safe rafting mark; operators are off the water.
alert.impact: Your morning rafting slot is cancelled by the river authority.
alert.swapIn: Yoga & meditation class at a Tapovan ashram (indoor)

udaipur.name: Udaipur
udaipur.tagline: City of Lakes - palaces on water, havelis and Aravalli sunsets.
udaipur.photo: udaipur lake pichola city palace water sunset
flexRules: Everything orbits Lake Pichola - base yourself near the old city ghats.
Old-city lanes are tight - walk or take an auto, skip a big car.
Time the lake boat ride for golden hour, not the harsh midday sun.

places.name: City Palace
places.photo: udaipur city palace lake pichola facade
places.why: Sprawling lakeside Mewar palace of courtyards, glass and mirror work.
places.tip: Enter at opening to walk the Zenana Mahal before tour groups.

places.name: Lake Pichola Boat Ride
places.photo: lake pichola udaipur boat sunset jag mandir
places.why: Sunset boat past the water palaces - the definitive Udaipur moment.
places.tip: Take the 4–5pm slot; it stops at Jag Mandir island.

places.name: Jag Mandir
places.photo: jag mandir island palace lake pichola udaipur
places.why: 17th-c. island palace with marble pavilions and a café.
places.tip: Reached only by boat - combine with the Pichola ride.

places.name: Bagore ki Haveli
places.photo: bagore ki haveli udaipur dharohar dance
places.why: Lakeside haveli-museum with a nightly Rajasthani folk dance show.
places.tip: Book the 7pm Dharohar dance - the ghoomar and bhavai are superb.

places.name: Saheliyon ki Bari
places.photo: saheliyon ki bari udaipur fountain garden
places.why: Ornamental 18th-c. garden of fountains, lotus pools and marble pavilions.
places.tip: Morning is coolest and the fountains run best.
places.howToReach: North of old city, auto ~15 min

places.name: Monsoon Palace (Sajjangarh)
places.photo: monsoon palace sajjangarh udaipur hilltop sunset
places.why: Aravalli hilltop palace with a sweeping sunset over the lakes.
places.tip: Take the forest-dept jeep from the gate; go for sunset.
places.howToReach: Cab to base + jeep up, ~30 min

places.name: Ambrai / Upre lakeside dinner
places.photo: ambrai restaurant udaipur lake pichola night view
places.why: Lit-up palace views across the water with Rajasthani fine dining.
places.tip: Reserve a water-edge table at Ambrai after dark.

places.name: Jagdish Temple
places.photo: jagdish temple udaipur indo aryan carving
places.why: 1651 Indo-Aryan Vishnu temple with intricate carved spires.
places.tip: A 3-min walk from City Palace - pair the two.

alert.title: Mewar Festival - old-city roads jammed
alert.why: A palace procession has closed the ghat roads around Gangaur; traffic and parking near the lake are gridlocked.
alert.impact: The evening Bagore ki Haveli dance show will be hard to reach in time.
alert.swapIn: Sunset at Ambrai lakeside (walkable, skips the closed roads)

generic.note: Any city NOT in `destinations` (or non-city text) resolves here. Title-case the input as the name and fill these templated places so the demo never dead-ends.
generic.tagline: A first-draft plan for {CITY}. Swap any stop you don't like.
flexRules: This is a starter draft - edit freely, it won't rebuild.
Stops are grouped by time of day to cut backtracking.
Add your saved Reels & links to personalise it.

places.name: {CITY} Old Town
places.why: The historic core - best on foot, early.
places.tip: Go before the crowds.

places.name: {CITY} Central Market
places.why: Local life, snacks, souvenirs.
places.tip: Try the street food row.

places.name: {CITY} Viewpoint
places.why: Golden-hour panorama over the city.
places.tip: Sunset is the move.

places.name: {CITY} Signature Restaurant
places.why: Reliable group dinner, local cuisine.
places.tip: Book ahead for groups.

places.name: {CITY} Park / Lake
places.why: Slow afternoon, easy pace.
places.tip: Good for a recharge.

places.name: {CITY} Museum
places.why: Indoor option - great rain backup.
places.tip: Closed Mondays usually.

alert.title: Afternoon rain expected
alert.why: Showers forecast midday - outdoor stops will be wet.

samplePoll.question: Day 2 evening - where to?
samplePoll.tieResolution: Planner tiebreak. On a mutual-veto deadlock, propose a neutral 3rd option.

derivations.note: How the app turns this data into the 'AI' outputs. Pure functions, no randomness needed.
derivations.draftGeneration: For a chosen theme: rank places by (suitability + 20 if place.cat in theme.prefer), drop vetoed ids, slice config.pace[pace].stopsPerDay per day across `days`, order each day by slot (morning/fullday → afternoon → evening), assign config.draftTimes by index, set cost = round(place.cost * config.budget[budget].mult). Day.dayCost = sum of stop costs.
derivations.options: Build one draft per config.themes entry; perPerson = sum(dayCost); group = perPerson * members; attach drafts[].rating + feedbackCount by matching theme id.
derivations.recommendations: Explore = places filtered by travelTags / cat / slot, sorted by suitability; 'why it fits' = place.why; score = place.suitability.
derivations.categorise: Inspiration items map to their categorisedAs place id - show 'AI sorted this into {place.name}'.
derivations.liveAlert: Use destination.alert; 'Accept re-plan' swaps the stop whose name starts with alert.swapOut for alert.swapIn in today's day.
derivations.bestFit: Tag the 'classic' theme as Best fit by default, or the draft with the highest rating.
